data.purpose: Every number, ticker, code span, citation ref. Always tabular-nums.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Workhorse row action: transparent, quiet hover fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--ink, #21222a); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; font: 500 13px "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--element, #efedea); }

components.name: List Row
components.description: Memory/skill row: text truncates, trailing ghost actions, hairline divider.
components.html: dcf-valuation — intrinsic valuation playbook
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hairline, #e7e6e3); font: 400 14px "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; color: #21222a; } .ds-row-text { flex: 1 1 auto; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #21222a; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; font: 500 13px "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #efedea; }

narrative.overview: A senior colleague who shows their work: warm-neutral surfaces, one indigo voice for action, hairline structure, numbers in mono. Warmth from clarity and guidance, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Warm tinted neutrals, never pure black/white
One accent (ledger indigo) for action/selection/citation only
Hairlines at rest; shadows only for true overlays

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the only voice of action.

rules.name: The Overlay-Only Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't float, it doesn't cast.

dos: Do give editing surfaces room (wide dialogs for editors, min 760px desktop)
Do disclose progressively before adding layers
Do pair status colors with glyph or word
donts: Don't build cramped modal-heavy UI or modal-from-modal
Don't ship SaaS dashboard tropes (card grids, hero metrics, gradients)
Don't use side-stripes, gradient text, glassmorphism, or a second accent
